requirements.task_name: Request a monthly lawn mowing quote for a small yard under $120/month
requirements.task_description: Find an ongoing lawn mowing service suitable for a property up to 1/4 acre, limited to a maximum price of $120 per month, select the highest-rated option, and submit a quote request form with specific contact details.

requirements.task_name: Book a one-time spring yard cleanup on the 15th at or after 3:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Use the online booking system to schedule a one-time spring cleanup service on the 15th of the current month, choosing the first available time slot starting at or after 3:00 PM, and complete the booking with pay-on-site selected.

requirements.task_name: Create a custom landscaping package with exactly 3 services under $400 total
requirements.task_description: Build a custom package by adding lawn mowing, hedge trimming, and flower bed mulching to a package builder, adjusting frequencies so that the estimated total is between $300 and $400, and proceed to the package review page.

requirements.task_name: Choose the best residential maintenance plan with mowing and leaf removal under $150/month
requirements.task_description: Compare residential maintenance plans that include both lawn mowing and leaf removal, cost no more than $150 per month, and select the plan that offers more visits per month before proceeding to the checkout page.

requirements.task_name: Request a consultation for a drought-tolerant front yard installation rated 4+ stars between $200–$600
requirements.task_description: Use search and filters to find a front yard drought-tolerant landscaping service with a customer rating of at least 4 stars and a price between $200 and $600, select the top-rated option, and submit a consultation request form.

requirements.task_name: Apply a 10% first-time customer promo code to a one-time lawn mowing service
requirements.task_description: Locate the first-time customer promotion offering 10% off, copy the promo code, add a 'Lawn Mowing - One-Time Visit' service to the cart, apply the promo code in the cart, and proceed to the payment step of checkout.

requirements.task_name: Save a backyard patio with fire pit project to favorites and request a similar design
requirements.task_description: Use the project gallery to filter for medium-sized backyard patio projects that include a fire pit, add the third resulting project to favorites, and submit a design request form referencing the project’s ID.

requirements.task_name: Ask about service availability for ZIP 60610 and cancellation policy via contact form
requirements.task_description: Use the FAQ section to find information on service areas and cancellation policy, then submit a contact form asking whether services are available in ZIP 60610 and how the cancellation policy applies there.

required_variables.set_condition: After executing a FAQ search where the normalized query string (query.trim().toLowerCase()) includes 'service area' and the filtered results array has length > 0.
required_variables.reason: Track that the user searched the FAQ for service area information, and which FAQ articles were returned, so the evaluator can confirm that a relevant search was performed.

required_variables.set_condition: After executing a FAQ search where the normalized query string includes 'cancellation' and the filtered results array has length > 0.
required_variables.reason: Track that the user searched the FAQ for cancellation policy information, capturing the query and the matching articles.

required_variables.set_condition: When getFAQArticle is called for an article whose title or content (both lowercased) contains 'service area' or 'where do you operate'.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user actually opened a FAQ article about service areas, not just searched for it.

required_variables.set_condition: When getFAQArticle is called for an article whose title or content (both lowercased) contains 'cancellation policy' or 'cancellation'.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user opened a FAQ article describing the cancellation policy, allowing verification that both required FAQ topics were consulted before sending the contact form.
